Record Class TelemetryRuleDTO

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.dto.telemetry.TelemetryRuleDTO
public record TelemetryRuleDTO(Long id, Long resourceId, String datapoint, TelemetryOperator operator, Double threshold, Double thresholdHigh, Double hysteresis, Severity severity, boolean enabled, TelemetryState state, LocalDateTime lastTransitionAt) extends Record
Flat, transport-safe view of a TelemetryRule. Carries only the owning resource's id, never the lazy Resource itself, so serializing a rule never triggers a LazyInitializationException or drags the whole resource graph onto the wire. Mapped inside a service transaction.
Author:
peter haller

    Creates an instance of a TelemetryRuleDTO record class.

  • Constructor Details

    • TelemetryRuleDTO

      public TelemetryRuleDTO(Long id, Long resourceId, String datapoint, TelemetryOperator operator, Double threshold, Double thresholdHigh, Double hysteresis, Severity severity, boolean enabled, TelemetryState state, LocalDateTime lastTransitionAt)
      Creates an instance of a TelemetryRuleDTO record class.
      Parameters:
      id - the value for the id record component
      resourceId - the value for the resourceId record component
      datapoint - the value for the datapoint record component
      operator - the value for the operator record component
      threshold - the value for the threshold record component
      thresholdHigh - the value for the thresholdHigh record component
      hysteresis - the value for the hysteresis record component
      severity - the value for the severity record component
      enabled - the value for the enabled record component
      state - the value for the state record component
      lastTransitionAt - the value for the lastTransitionAt record component

  • Method Details

    • from

      public static TelemetryRuleDTO from(TelemetryRule rule)
      Maps an entity to its DTO. Call within a transaction (resource.getId() is lazy).

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
